member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Contracts.TagsAssignedIntegrationEvent
member.summary: Represents an integration event that occurs when one or more tags are assigned to a target entity within a specified context.
member.param: The original entity ID (e.g. idea-abc123) to which the tags are assigned.
An array of tags that are assigned to the target entity. Each tag is represented as a string.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Contracts.TagsAssignedIntegrationEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Represents an integration event that occurs when one or more tags are assigned to a target entity within a specified context.
member.param: The original entity ID (e.g. idea-abc123) to which the tags are assigned.
An array of tags that are assigned to the target entity. Each tag is represented as a string.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Contracts.TagsAssignedIntegrationEvent.EntityId
member.summary: The original entity ID (e.g. idea-abc123) to which the tags are assigned.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Contracts.TagsAssignedIntegrationEvent.TagIds
member.summary: An array of tags that are assigned to the target entity. Each tag is represented as a string.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Tagging.Contracts.TagsRemovedIntegrationEvent
member.summary: Represents an event that occurs when one or more tags are removed from a target entity within a specific context.
member.param: The original entity ID (e.g. idea-abc123) from which tags have been removed.
An array containing the unique identifiers of the tags that were removed from the target entity.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Tagging.Contracts.TagsRemovedIntegrationEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Represents an event that occurs when one or more tags are removed from a target entity within a specific context.
member.param: The original entity ID (e.g. idea-abc123) from which tags have been removed.
An array containing the unique identifiers of the tags that were removed from the target entity.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Contracts.TagsRemovedIntegrationEvent.EntityId
member.summary: The original entity ID (e.g. idea-abc123) from which tags have been removed.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Tagging.Contracts.TagsRemovedIntegrationEvent.TagIds
member.summary: An array containing the unique identifiers of the tags that were removed from the target entity.
